Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
50 
DED_COINS 
LABEL: 
Part D plan Deductible Phase Coinsurance Percentage 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the coinsurance percentage beneficiaries are charged by the plan for enhanced 
alternative plans that offer cost sharing during the deductible phase. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
The CCW constructs the plan characteristics
